settings.heading: Small Wins. Big Belonging.
settings.body:
Start the year with a WIN! We’re celebrating the resilience, gratitude, and small victories that make our community strong.

Whether you’re saving on groceries, mastering a new recipe, or helping a neighbour—we want to hear about it! From 23 March to 23 April, share your "Small Win" or "2026 Hack" with us and you could be rewarded with a massive grocery boost to kickstart your year.

settings.heading: How to Enter:
settings.body:
Step 1: Visit our Facebook, Instagram or TikTok page.

Step 2: Look for our weekly “Small Wins” posts.

Step 3: Comment your story, tip, or hack using #BostonSmallWins and tag a friend who deserves recognition.

settings.heading: Ts & Cs:
settings.body:
• The promotion is open to all legal residents and/or legal citizens of South Africa who are 18 years or older.
  • Employees, directors, partners, agents, and their immediate families of the Promoter and participating retailers are not eligible to participate.
  • The draw will take place at the end of the campaign (23 April 2026), with 10 lucky winners receiving a Grocery Voucher worth R5000. This will be a random draw and only eligible participants who have entered at least once during the campaign will be included.
  • The Grocery Voucher worth R5000 will be valid at any participating Grocery Store.
  • Participants can enter as many times as they like during the promotional period, provided each entry is valid.
